projects.title: AI-Powered Web Application
projects.shortDescription: A full-stack web application that leverages machine learning algorithms to provide intelligent recommendations and data analysis.
projects.fullDescription: This comprehensive web application integrates cutting-edge machine learning algorithms to deliver intelligent recommendations and real-time data analysis. Built with a modern tech stack, it features a responsive React frontend, robust Node.js backend, and Python-based ML services. The application processes large datasets to provide actionable insights and personalized user experiences.
features: Machine learning integration for intelligent recommendations
Responsive design optimized for all devices
challenges: Integrating ML models with web application architecture
learnings: Advanced React patterns and state management

projects.title: Robotics Control System
projects.shortDescription: An advanced control system for autonomous robots with computer vision capabilities and real-time navigation.
projects.fullDescription: A sophisticated robotics control system designed for autonomous navigation and operation. The system integrates computer vision algorithms, sensor fusion, and advanced path planning to enable robots to navigate complex environments safely and efficiently. Built using C++ for performance-critical components and Python for high-level control logic.
features: Computer vision integration for object detection and recognition
Real-time control system with low latency
challenges: Achieving real-time performance for control systems
Integrating multiple sensors for accurate navigation
learnings: Computer vision and image processing techniques

projects.title: Mobile Finance App
projects.shortDescription: A comprehensive mobile application for personal finance management with budgeting tools and expense tracking.
projects.fullDescription: A feature-rich mobile application designed to help users manage their personal finances effectively. The app provides comprehensive budgeting tools, expense tracking, financial analytics, and secure cloud synchronization. Built with React Native for cross-platform compatibility and Firebase for backend services.
features: Smart budget management with alerts and notifications
Secure user authentication with biometric support
challenges: Creating intuitive user interface for complex features
learnings: Mobile app development with React Native

projects.title: Portfolio Website
projects.shortDescription: A modern, responsive portfolio website showcasing projects, skills, and professional experience.
projects.fullDescription: This portfolio website represents a modern approach to personal branding and professional presentation. Built with vanilla JavaScript and modular CSS, it features a clean design, smooth animations, and excellent performance. The site is fully responsive and optimized for SEO and accessibility.
features: Fully responsive design for all device sizes
Dark/light theme toggle with system preference detection
Contact form with validation and submission
challenges: Creating smooth animations without performance impact
Implementing PWA features for offline functionality
Optimizing for Core Web Vitals metrics
learnings: Modern JavaScript APIs and best practices
